chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 178 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Ayoub Qasar, Advocate along with applicant Ms. Sana Memon APG Complainant present in person The applicant is the owner of the vehicle which was being driven by Zulfiqar Ali and which allegedly struck a van in which Tariq Mehmood was travelling and the accident caused Tariq Mehmood’s death. This is primarily a case of rash and negligent driving and there appears little reason for Muhammad Aslam to have been introduced as an accused in this case. Learned counsel for the applicant explained that after the accident, the police was trying to trace who the owner of the vehicle is, and those attempts led them to the present applicant. As stated above, I see no reason to deny bail to Muhammad Aslam, the owner of the vehicle who was not even present at the scene of incident. Accordingly the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
